basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has published the Professor of Practice (PoP) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 20 Professor of Practice (PoP) positions on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 70 years of age who are distinguished experts with remarkable professional contributions, at least 20 years of experience including 5 years in leadership roles, and fulfilling the prescribed eligibility criteria are eligible to apply online on or before 06 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and onlin

qualification.education_qualification: Distinguished experts with remarkable contributions in profession and at least 20 years experience with 5 years leadership, No formal academic qualification essential if exemplary professional practice, Skills to carry out duties similar to regular Professor
qualification.details: Distinguished experts with at least 20 years of service/experience including minimum 5 years in leadership position. Formal academic qualification may not be essential if exemplary professional practice in lieu. Not open for teaching profession serving or retired. Skills to carry out duties similar to regular Professor.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,00,000/- Consolidated (IIEST funded) or mutually agreed (industry funded) or Honorary

selection_process: Application/Nomination via Google Form Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice (PoP) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIEST Shibpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIEST Shibpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice (PoP) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice (PoP) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIEST Shibpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice (PoP) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIEST Shibpur Professor of Practice (PoP) recruitment is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Professor of Practice (PoP) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for the Professor of Practice (PoP) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Professor of Practice (PoP) position?
faq.answer: Distinguished experts with at least 20 years of service/experience, including 5 years in leadership, are eligible. Formal academic qualification may not be essential if there is exemplary professional practice.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professor of Practice (PoP) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Professor of Practice (PoP) post is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor of Practice (PoP) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1,00,000/- Consolidated (IIEST funded) or mutually agreed (industry funded) or Honorary.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professor of Practice (PoP) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application/nomination via Google Form followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Professor of Practice (PoP) position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIEST Shibpur?
faq.answer: The official website of Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur is https://www.iiests.ac.in.
